tagline: From scattered retail data to unified insights in 10 steps

steps.title: Ingest Everything
steps.body: Connect CSV, Excel, PDF receipts, images, JSON, SQL dumps, and ERP logs. Retify extracts structured data from every format using format-specific parsers and OCR.
steps.visualContent: flowchart LR; A[CSV] --> R[Retify]; B[PDF] --> R; C[ERP] --> R;

steps.title: AI Schema Detection
steps.body: AI infers field meanings, data types, and units without manual mapping. New store rollouts inherit detected schemas automatically.
steps.visualContent: Schema detection maps raw columns to canonical retail entities.

steps.title: Entity Matching
steps.body: Match products, customers, and stores across sources into golden records that remove duplicates and align hierarchies.
steps.visualContent: Golden records unify SKU and store identifiers.

steps.title: Quality Diagnosis
steps.body: Automated profiling finds missing fields, anomalies, and compliance issues before data reaches your warehouse.
steps.visualContent: Quality scores and issue reports per dataset.

steps.title: NLP Insights
steps.body: Store managers and analysts query unified retail data in natural language — converted to SQL with charts and summaries.
steps.visualContent: Chatbot queries over unified warehouse tables.
